# services.airsonic

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.airsonic`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.airsonic.contextPath` | `absolute path` | The context path, i.e., the last part of the Airsonic URL. Typically '/' or '/airsonic'. Default '/' |
| `services.airsonic.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Airsonic, the Free and Open Source media streaming server (fork of Subsonic and Libresonic). |
| `services.airsonic.home` | `absolute path` | The directory where Airsonic will create files. Make sure it is writable. |
| `services.airsonic.jre` | `package` | The jre8 package to use. ::: {.note} Airsonic only supports Java 8, airsonic-advanced requires at least Java 11. ::: |
| `services.airsonic.jvmOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options for the JVM running AirSonic. Useful for sending jukebox output to non-default alsa devices. |
| `services.airsonic.listenAddress` | `string` | The host name or IP address on which to bind Airsonic. The default value is appropriate for first launch, when the default credentials are easy to guess. It is also appropriate if you intend to use the virtualhost option in the service module. In other cases, you may want to change this to a specific IP or 0.0.0.0 to listen on all interfaces. |
| `services.airsonic.maxMemory` | `signed integer` | The memory limit (max Java heap size) in megabytes. Default: 100 |
| `services.airsonic.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which Airsonic will listen for incoming HTTP traffic. Set to 0 to disable. |
| `services.airsonic.transcoders` | `list of absolute path` | List of paths to transcoder executables that should be accessible from Airsonic. Symlinks will be created to each executable inside ${config.services.airsonic.home}/transcoders. |
| `services.airsonic.user` | `string` | User account under which airsonic runs. |
| `services.airsonic.virtualHost` | `null or string` | Name of the nginx virtualhost to use and setup. If null, do not setup any virtualhost. |
| `services.airsonic.war` | `absolute path` | Airsonic war file to use. |
